full_text:
Xiahou Lian 夏侯廉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Lian (夏侯廉). Brother of Xiahou Dun, became a Duke. Xiahou Lian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
